---
title: "Software"
toc: false
---

Open-source tools for conflict and political violence text analysis, built as part of the NSF-funded [ConfliBERT project](https://eventdata.utdallas.edu/).

```{=html}
<div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 1.5rem; margin-top: 1.5rem;">
  <a href="conflibert-gui.html" class="tool-card">
    <h3>ConfliBERT GUI</h3>
    <p>Browser-based interface for running NER, classification, question answering, and fine-tuning custom models on conflict text. No coding required.</p>
  </a>
  <a href="conflibertr.html" class="tool-card">
    <h3>conflibertR</h3>
    <p>R package wrapping ConfliBERT for inference, fine-tuning, benchmarking, and model comparison &mdash; all from your R console.</p>
  </a>
</div>
```
